channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump puts Taiwan arms sales, Hong Kong jailed activist Lai on agenda ahead of meeting with Xi
item.description: Trump said Monday that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai would be among the issues at the summit in Beijing.

item.title: European stocks open sharply lower as hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal fade
item.description: European began Tuesday's session in negative territory as prospects for a speedy resolution to the U.S.-Iran war appear increasingly remote.

item.title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
item.description: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.

item.title: Behind Big Oil’s first-quarter beat: The quiet rise of trading desks
item.description: Europe's oil supermajors highlighted trading contributions as they reported stronger-than-expected profits through the first three months of the year.

item.title: Trump invites Elon Musk, Tim Cook, Larry Fink and other CEOs to join China trip for Xi summit
item.description: Trump invited Tesla's Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook and Blackrock's Larry Fink to join his China trip for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, AI and geopolitics.

item.title: UK should commit to rejoin the EU, London mayor tells CNBC
item.description: London mayor Sadiq Khan said that Prime Minister Keir Starmer should commit to rejoining the European Union and be "bigger and bolder."

item.title: CNBC Daily Open: Can Starmer ‘keep calm and carry on?'
item.description: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces a crunch cabinet meeting this morning, after failing to quell a growing party rebellion.

item.title: Asia's trillion-dollar titans are powering — and distorting — its fastest growing stock markets
item.description: Taiwan's Taiex and South Korea's Kospi stock markets have been seeing record breaking rallies. The stunning surge leaves experts wondering if this growth hinges largely on a few AI-linked semiconductor giants.

item.title: OpenAI trial: Nadella says Musk never raised concerns to him about Microsoft investment
item.description: Elon Musk named Microsoft as a defendant in his lawsuit against OpenAI

item.title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump comments diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
item.description: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

item.title: Trump, congressional Republicans float suspending federal gas tax amid Iran war
item.description: Voters are souring on Trump's economy ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, and high gas prices are only adding to consumer discontent.

item.title: Redistricting war isn't over, Democrats say as Jeffries calls a meeting this week
item.description: Democrats are vowing to fight on after being dealt a series of blows in the partisan fight to redraw congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: Asia markets trade mixed as investors weigh Trump’s ceasefire warning
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors weighed fresh doubts over the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Investors are piling into dividend stocks this year. These names top Wall Street’s buy list
item.description: CNBC Pro screened for dividend-paying stocks that have an average rating of buy and at least 15% upside to the average price target.

item.title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Trump and Xi face a test over AI control
item.description: The stakes for AI security have risen sharply in the runup to the first trip to China by a sitting U.S. president in nearly a decade.

item.title: Inflation reading Tuesday expected to show prices at nearly a three-year high
item.description: April's consumer price index, a broad gauge of goods and services costs across the U.S. economy, is forecast to reach an annual rate of 3.7%.

item.title: Hantavirus cases spark brief surge in pharma and biotech stocks — here’s why trading is so volatile
item.description: The outbreak of Hantavirus on a cruise ship has led to biotech and pharmaceutical stocks surging on reports of firms developing vaccines.

item.title: Google says it likely thwarted effort by hacker group to use AI for 'mass exploitation event'
item.description: Hackers are rapidly adopting AI to find previously unknown software flaws even without the help of Anthropic's powerful Mythos model.

item.title: Why joining the family business was James Reed’s hardest decision — and why it paid off
item.description: James Reed reflects on the decision that defined his career — taking the risk of joining the family business. The Reed CEO discusses failure, purpose and why standing still is the worst decision of all.

item.title: OpenAI revenue chief Dresser says enterprise AI adoption is 'at a tipping point'
item.description: The OpenAI Development Company is a partnership with 19 investment and consultancy firms and is majority-owned and controlled by the startup.

item.title: A beat-and-raise is key for Qnity — plus, high stakes for CEOs on Trump China trip
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: CNBC Points Pro: I have 300,000 points but don’t travel much anymore. What should I do with my Amex Platinum?
item.description: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains why downgrading your Amex Platinum Card may be better than closing it.

item.title: Parabolic AI rally has bulls eyeing a comeback for this one-time meme metal trade
item.description: Silver prices surged 7% Monday to the highest since March.

item.title: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
item.description: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.

item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Investors looked past another setback in the Middle East on Monday, as the S&P 500 ticked higher for its first close above 7,400.

item.title: Saudi Aramco CEO says oil market won't normalize until 2027 if Hormuz disruption persists
item.description: Oil inventories are rapidly drawing down as the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, Saudi Aramco CEO Amin Nasser said.

item.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs
item.description: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.

item.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
item.description: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.

item.title: Biggest Micron bulls on Wall Street say they're even more confident now. Here's why
item.description: Some analysts are extremely bullish on the semiconductor maker. Others are not.

item.title: Former Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins EV battery recycler Redwood Materials
item.description: Before joining Redwood Materials, Ahuja served as chief financial and business officer at the drone delivery startup Zipline for about three years.
